spec_match.rationale: Fully native. Correctly tests the comma-separated syntax with direct CSS selectors mapped to resizable DOM containers.

interactive.rationale: Excellent with sidebar and main width sliders, showing which container query is firing in real-time.

edge_cases.rationale: Works natively, falling back gracefully to standard flow layouts.

references.rationale: Includes correct relative links to fallback-layout, or-breakpoints, and multi-container-grid.

design_system.rationale: Consistent style variables, clear active badges, and readable code blocks.

summary: A flawless native CSS resizer demonstration presenting multi-container profile cards adapting to layouts using comma-separated logical OR conditions.
